emails.subject: GD and Price Options
emails.body: Errol, We are trying to make sure that everyone that is trading options with us off line are aware that we have both GD and Price Options on EOL. Do you have a list of companies that are trading with us? If not a post ID would suffice. I still have some queries that I can run from my risk days. Thanks for your help. Bryan Hull 3-9195

emails.body: Re: GD and Price Options Bryan, I do not have a comprehensive list, but the post ID for the options book as of 03/30/2001 is 1095031. Please let me know if I can I can be of any further assistance. Errol, X5-8274 Bryan Hull@ECT 04/03/2001 01:19 PM
